+
+
+def test_upgrade_deps_depth_limit():
+    from ansible.galaxy.dependency_resolution.providers import CollectionDependencyProvider
+
+    provider = CollectionDependencyProvider(
+        apis=MagicMock(),
+        concrete_artifacts_manager=MagicMock(),
+        user_requirements=[Requirement('root.col', '*', None, 'galaxy')],
+        preferred_candidates=[],
+        with_deps=True,
+        with_pre_releases=False,
+        upgrade=True,
+    )
+
+    assert provider._dep_depth.get('root.col') == 0
+
+    mock_candidate = MagicMock()
+    mock_candidate.fqcn = 'root.col'
+    mock_candidate.is_virtual = False
+
+    provider._api_proxy = MagicMock()
+    provider._api_proxy.get_collection_dependencies = MagicMock(return_value={
+        'level1.dep': '>=1.0.0',
+    })
+
+    deps = provider.get_dependencies(mock_candidate)
+    assert len(deps) == 1
+    assert provider._dep_depth.get('level1.dep') == 1
+
+    mock_candidate_l1 = MagicMock()
+    mock_candidate_l1.fqcn = 'level1.dep'
+    mock_candidate_l1.is_virtual = False
+
+    provider._api_proxy.get_collection_dependencies = MagicMock(return_value={
+        'level2.dep': '>=1.0.0',
+    })
+
+    deps_l1 = provider.get_dependencies(mock_candidate_l1)
+    assert len(deps_l1) == 1
+    assert provider._dep_depth.get('level2.dep') == 2
+
+    for fqcn, expected_upgrade in [('root.col', True), ('level1.dep', True), ('level2.dep', False)]:
+        dep_depth = provider._dep_depth.get(fqcn, 0)
+        upgrade_allowed = provider._upgrade and dep_depth <= 1
+        assert upgrade_allowed is expected_upgrade
+
+
+def test_upgrade_candidate_version_limit(monkeypatch, tmp_path_factory, galaxy_server):
+    from ansible.galaxy.dependency_resolution.providers import CollectionDependencyProvider
+
+    test_dir = to_bytes(tmp_path_factory.mktemp('test-ÅÑŚÌβŁÈ Collections Input'))
+    concrete_artifact_cm = collection.concrete_artifact_manager.ConcreteArtifactsManager(test_dir, validate_certs=False)
+
+    versions = [("1.0.%d" % i, galaxy_server) for i in range(50)]
+
+    mock_get_info = MagicMock(return_value=api.CollectionVersionMetadata('ns', 'coll', '1.0.49', None, None, {}))
+    monkeypatch.setattr(galaxy_server, 'get_collection_version_metadata', mock_get_info)
+
+    provider = CollectionDependencyProvider(
+        apis=MagicMock(),
+        concrete_artifacts_manager=concrete_artifact_cm,
+        user_requirements=[Requirement('ns.coll', '*', None, 'galaxy')],
+        preferred_candidates=[],
+        with_deps=True,
+        with_pre_releases=False,
+        upgrade=True,
+    )
+
+    provider._api_proxy = MagicMock()
+    provider._api_proxy.get_collection_versions = MagicMock(return_value=versions)
+
+    req = Requirement('ns.coll', '*', None, 'galaxy')
+    matches = provider.find_matches([req])
+
+    assert len(matches) <= 25
+
+
+def test_upgrade_source_fallback_depth(monkeypatch, tmp_path_factory):
+    from ansible.galaxy.dependency_resolution.providers import CollectionDependencyProvider
+
+    test_dir = to_bytes(tmp_path_factory.mktemp('test-ÅÑŚÌβŁÈ Collections Input'))
+    concrete_artifact_cm = collection.concrete_artifact_manager.ConcreteArtifactsManager(test_dir, validate_certs=False)
+
+    server1 = MagicMock()
+    server1.name = 'server1'
+    server2 = MagicMock()
+    server2.name = 'server2'
+
+    versions_from_both = [('1.0.0', server1), ('2.0.0', server2)]
+
+    provider = CollectionDependencyProvider(
+        apis=MagicMock(),
+        concrete_artifacts_manager=concrete_artifact_cm,
+        user_requirements=[Requirement('ns.coll', '*', None, 'galaxy')],
+        preferred_candidates=[],
+        with_deps=True,
+        with_pre_releases=False,
+        upgrade=True,
+    )
+
+    provider._api_proxy = MagicMock()
+    provider._api_proxy.get_collection_versions = MagicMock(return_value=versions_from_both)
+
+    req = Requirement('ns.coll', '*', None, 'galaxy')
+    matches = provider.find_matches([req])
+
+    server_ids_in_matches = set()
+    for m in matches:
+        if m.src is not None:
+            server_ids_in_matches.add(id(m.src))
+
+    assert len(server_ids_in_matches) <= 1
